description: Detection-only starter pack for Virtual TreeView. Virtual TreeView uses virtual node/data callbacks and custom drawing, so automatic FMX conversion is not safe without application-specific code migration.

rules.manual_review_reason: VirtualStringTree node initialization, text callbacks, columns, images, check states, and node data require manual migration.
Owner-drawn virtual tree rendering requires manual FMX redesign.
Base virtual tree descendants require manual migration.
Custom virtual string tree descendants require manual migration.
Custom virtual draw tree descendants require manual migration.
Column collections must be migrated together with the owning virtual tree.
Tree columns must be migrated together with the owning virtual tree.
